allow: Bash(sqlite3 -column -header /opt/gigsfill/backend.db "SELECT id, status, scheduled_process_at, processed_at, amount_cents, parent_transaction_id, transaction_type FROM transactions WHERE id IN \(287, 288\);")

Bash(sqlite3 -column -header /opt/gigsfill/backend.db "SELECT id, gig_id, status, scheduled_process_at, transaction_type FROM transactions WHERE status IN \('scheduled', 'test', 'charge_retry'\) AND scheduled_process_at <= '2026-05-08 01:00:00' ORDER BY scheduled_process_at;")
Bash(sqlite3 /opt/gigsfill/backend.db "SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM platform_settings WHERE setting_key IN \('payments_enabled','test_mode','maintenance_mode'\);")

Bash(sqlite3 /opt/gigsfill/backend.db "SELECT 'gig_email_log: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM gig_email_log UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM notifications UNION ALL SELECT 'public_activity: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM public_activity UNION ALL SELECT 'venue_email_history: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM venue_email_history UNION ALL SELECT 'gig_messages: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM gig_messages UNION ALL SELECT 'support_ticket_replies: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM support_ticket_replies UNION ALL SELECT 'onboarding_visits: ' || COUNT\(*\) FROM onboarding_visits;")
